mapper.select:
select count(*) from nx_platform_order_assign poa inner join nx_department_orders dor on dor.nx_department_orders_id = poa.nx_poa_order_id where poa.nx_poa_market_id = #{marketId} and poa.nx_poa_assign_status = 'PENDING' and poa.nx_poa_assign_mode = 'PLATFORM' and dor.nx_DO_status >= 0
and dor.nx_DO_apply_date = #{applyDate}

select case when poa.nx_poa_source_type = 'GB' or (dor.nx_DO_gb_department_id is not null and dor.nx_DO_gb_department_id > 0) then coalesce( nullif(dor.nx_DO_gb_department_father_id, -1), nullif(poa.nx_poa_gb_department_father_id, 0), dor.nx_DO_gb_department_id, poa.nx_poa_gb_department_id ) else dor.nx_DO_department_father_id end as depFatherId, max(coalesce(nullif(poa.nx_poa_gb_department_id, 0), dor.nx_DO_gb_department_id, poa.nx_poa_department_id)) as gbDepartmentId, max(gd.gb_department_name) as gbDepartmentName, max(poa.nx_poa_market_id) as marketId from nx_department_orders dor inner join nx_platform_order_assign poa on poa.nx_poa_order_id = dor.nx_department_orders_id and poa.nx_poa_assign_mode = 'PLATFORM' and poa.nx_poa_assign_status = 'ASSIGNED' left join gb_department gd on gd.gb_department_id = coalesce( nullif(dor.nx_DO_gb_department_id, -1), nullif(poa.nx_poa_gb_department_id, 0), poa.nx_poa_department_id ) where ( dor.nx_DO_distributer_id = #{disId} or poa.nx_poa_assigned_distributer_id = #{disId} ) and (dor.nx_DO_collaborative_nx_dis_id = -1 or dor.nx_DO_collaborative_nx_dis_id is null) and dor.nx_DO_status >= 0 and dor.nx_DO_status < 3 group by depFatherId having depFatherId is not null and depFatherId > 0

select case when poa.nx_poa_source_type = 'GB' or (dor.nx_DO_gb_department_id is not null and dor.nx_DO_gb_department_id > 0) then 'GB' else 'NX' end as customerSource, case when poa.nx_poa_source_type = 'GB' or (dor.nx_DO_gb_department_id is not null and dor.nx_DO_gb_department_id > 0) then coalesce( nullif(dor.nx_DO_gb_department_father_id, -1), nullif(poa.nx_poa_gb_department_father_id, 0), dor.nx_DO_gb_department_id, poa.nx_poa_gb_department_id ) else dor.nx_DO_department_father_id end as groupKey, max(coalesce(nullif(poa.nx_poa_gb_department_id, 0), dor.nx_DO_gb_department_id, poa.nx_poa_department_id)) as gbDepartmentId, max(gd.gb_department_name) as gbDepartmentName, max(gd.gb_department_attr_name) as gbDepartmentAttrName, max(poa.nx_poa_market_id) as marketId, max(case when dor.nx_DO_gb_department_id = -1 then dor.nx_DO_department_father_id else null end) as nxDepFatherId, max(nd.nx_department_attr_name) as nxDepAttrName, count(case when dor.nx_DO_status = -2 then 1 end) as undo_count, count(case when dor.nx_DO_status < 3 and dor.nx_DO_status > -2 and dor.nx_DO_price is not null and dor.nx_DO_price != 0.1 then 1 end) as hasPrice, count(case when dor.nx_DO_status < 3 and dor.nx_DO_purchase_status > 3 then 1 end) as hasWeight, count(case when dor.nx_DO_status < 3 and dor.nx_DO_status > -2 then 1 end) as totalCount, count(case when dor.nx_DO_status = 2 and dor.nx_DO_purchase_status > 3 and dor.nx_DO_price != 0.1 and dor.nx_DO_subtotal > 0 then 1 end) as finishCount, sum(case when dor.nx_DO_status = 2 and dor.nx_DO_purchase_status > 3 then dor.nx_DO_subtotal else 0 end) as totalSubtotal from nx_department_orders dor inner join nx_platform_order_assign poa on poa.nx_poa_order_id = dor.nx_department_orders_id and poa.nx_poa_assign_mode = 'PLATFORM' and poa.nx_poa_assign_status = 'ASSIGNED' left join gb_department gd on gd.gb_department_id = coalesce( nullif(dor.nx_DO_gb_department_id, -1), nullif(poa.nx_poa_gb_department_id, 0), poa.nx_poa_department_id ) left join nx_department nd on nd.nx_department_id = dor.nx_DO_department_father_id and (dor.nx_DO_gb_department_id is null or dor.nx_DO_gb_department_id = -1) where ( dor.nx_DO_distributer_id = #{disId} or poa.nx_poa_assigned_distributer_id = #{disId} ) and (dor.nx_DO_collaborative_nx_dis_id = -1 or dor.nx_DO_collaborative_nx_dis_id is null) and dor.nx_DO_status >= 0 and dor.nx_DO_status < 3 group by customerSource, groupKey having groupKey is not null and groupKey > 0 order by customerSource, groupKey

select (select count(*) from nx_platform_order_assign poa inner join nx_department_orders dor on dor.nx_department_orders_id = poa.nx_poa_order_id where poa.nx_poa_assign_mode = 'PLATFORM' and poa.nx_poa_assign_status = 'ASSIGNED' and dor.nx_DO_distributer_id = #{disId} and dor.nx_DO_status >= 0) as assignedByOrderDisId, (select count(*) from nx_platform_order_assign poa inner join nx_department_orders dor on dor.nx_department_orders_id = poa.nx_poa_order_id where poa.nx_poa_assign_mode = 'PLATFORM' and poa.nx_poa_assign_status = 'ASSIGNED' and poa.nx_poa_assigned_distributer_id = #{disId} and dor.nx_DO_status >= 0) as assignedByPoaDisId, (select count(*) from nx_platform_order_assign poa inner join nx_department_orders dor on dor.nx_department_orders_id = poa.nx_poa_order_id where poa.nx_poa_assign_mode = 'PLATFORM' and poa.nx_poa_assign_status = 'ASSIGNED' and (dor.nx_DO_distributer_id = #{disId} or poa.nx_poa_assigned_distributer_id = #{disId}) and (dor.nx_DO_collaborative_nx_dis_id = -1 or dor.nx_DO_collaborative_nx_dis_id is null) and dor.nx_DO_status >= 0 and dor.nx_DO_status < 3) as assignedOpenOrders, (select count(*) from nx_platform_order_assign poa inner join nx_department_orders dor on dor.nx_department_orders_id = poa.nx_poa_order_id where poa.nx_poa_assign_mode = 'PLATFORM' and poa.nx_poa_assign_status = 'PENDING' and (dor.nx_DO_distributer_id = #{disId} or poa.nx_poa_assigned_distributer_id = #{disId}) and dor.nx_DO_status >= 0) as pendingOrders, (select group_concat(t.order_id) from ( select dor.nx_department_orders_id as order_id from nx_platform_order_assign poa inner join nx_department_orders dor on dor.nx_department_orders_id = poa.nx_poa_order_id where poa.nx_poa_assign_mode = 'PLATFORM' and poa.nx_poa_assign_status = 'ASSIGNED' and (dor.nx_DO_distributer_id = #{disId} or poa.nx_poa_assigned_distributer_id = #{disId}) and dor.nx_DO_status >= 0 order by dor.nx_department_orders_id limit 5 ) t) as sampleOrderIds
mapper.update: update nx_platform_order_assign set `nx_poa_assign_status` = 'PENDING', `nx_poa_assigned_distributer_id` = null, `nx_poa_assigned_dis_goods_id` = null, `nx_poa_assigned_price` = null, `nx_poa_assigned_at` = null, `nx_poa_assigned_by` = null where nx_poa_id = #{value}
